allow: Bash(python -c "import os; keys=[k for k in os.environ if 'ANTHROPIC' in k.upper\(\) or 'CLAUDE' in k.upper\(\)]; print\(keys or 'none found'\)")
Bash(python -c "import os; key=os.environ.get\('ANTHROPIC_API_KEY',''\); print\('key present:', bool\(key\), '| prefix:', key[:8] if key else 'none'\)")
Bash(python -c "import os; key=os.environ.get\('ANTHROPIC_API_KEY',''\); print\(bool\(key\), key[:12] if key else 'missing'\)")
Bash(python -c "import os; v=os.environ.get\('ANTHROPIC_API_KEY','MISSING'\); print\(repr\(v[:20]\) if v != 'MISSING' else 'MISSING'\)")

PowerShell(cd C:\\Users\\kpbon\\WebsiteApps\\Evenfield; $key = \(Get-ItemProperty -Path "HKCU:\\Environment" -Name "ANTHROPIC_API_KEY" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\).ANTHROPIC_API_KEY; if \($key\) { $env:ANTHROPIC_API_KEY = $key; python enrichment.py } else { Write-Host "API key not found in registry" })
